title: 1981-04-16_Pat_153.txt
key_claims: Dick interprets "Galina's dream" from his novel *The Divine Invasion* as proof that idealistic Soviet scientists, working with Benelux counterparts, possess the psychotronic technology behind VALIS.

These scientists have transcended national identity. Although fundamentalists label this movement the "Anti-Christ," Dick argues that since the creator (the status quo) is irrational, the "Anti-Christ" actually represents true, saving rationality.

Reincarnation is proven: Dick asserts he literally is Thomas, one of the original disciples reborn, performing the sacred drama of awaiting Christ's return, establishing that the current timeline is "sacred time."
The union of Yin (PKD, the irrational, incarnated self) and Yang (Thomas/Logos, the rational, unfallen self) creates the Avatar of Synthesis.
recurring_concepts: **Value Reversal**: The Gnostic concept that the true divine elements appear as the "Anti-Christ" or are found in the "trash stratum," while the orthodox symbols of divinity actually represent the oppressive creator.
reading_excerpt: Dick interprets "Galina's dream" from his novel *The Divine Invasion* as proof that idealistic Soviet scientists, working with Benelux counterparts, possess the psychotronic technology behind VALIS.
